prompt: If this immutable pilot revision contains recognized supported V0 state, capture exact archive/export evidence, exercise the selected kill point, and initialize fresh V1 from the archive receipt without moving documents or mutating V0. Otherwise record a signed evaluator finding that names the inspected paths and why P1 is inapplicable.
applicability: Eligible only when the locked starting revision contains supported V0 schema and recognized provenance; otherwise a written evaluator finding is mandatory.
acceptance_tests: Eligible runs preserve V0 source bytes and document paths while binding exact archive/export/receipt digests.
The selected kill point recovers through the owning Phase 3 or Phase 4 contract.
Inapplicable runs contain a concrete evaluator finding instead of an omitted card.
mandatory_failures: V0 data or a target document changes.
An eligible run lacks an archive or receipt digest.
P1 is omitted or called inapplicable without a finding.
evidence_requirements: Source before/after digests and archive/export/receipt identities when eligible.
Kill-point transcript or signed inapplicability finding.
